reasoning: Bobby Finke holds the fully ratified world record in the 1500m long course freestyle, set in August 2024 with a time of 14:30.67 (the Wikipedia table up to Nov 2025 shows no '#' indicating pending ratification). World records in this event tend to be long-lasting (Sun Yang held the previous record for 12 years, and Grant Hackett before him for a decade). There are no credible doping suspensions or controversies involving Finke that would suggest an imminent retroactive annulment. Consequently, retaining the record across these dates is highly probable, with uncertainty marginally increasing for the latest date due to unexpected contingencies.
